title: alyssum semidodecandra
intro: Alyssum semidodecandra, also known as Madanaphora, is a plant species within the family Brassicaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly for its use as a laxative and diuretic. The health benefits of Alyssum semidodecandra include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Alyssum semidodecandra include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine.
